references.name: Sidebar Workspace Application Layout
references.summary: Default Yeeflow application chrome for generated apps using a compact 46px top header and a persistent left navigation menu.
references.whenToUse: Use for all newly generated Yeeflow business applications unless the user explicitly selects another Yeeflow application layout.
references.whenNotToUse: Do not use when the user explicitly requests horizontal navigation, header navigation, or a no-navigation application shell.
references.businessUse: Best for operational workspaces with grouped data lists, dashboards, approval forms, and reports that need stable left-side navigation.
references.generationProof: Generated packages must materialize this template into decoded ListSet.LayoutView and must assign FontAwesome icons to every visible business navigation group and item.
references.proofBoundary: This reference governs application LayoutView chrome and navigation icon contracts. It does not replace the Soft outline controls control-style Themes template.
